note: Hybrid realism bundle: 2 real US federal forms (I-9 from USCIS, W-4 from IRS — both public-domain US government documents) + 18 synthesized HR files covering policies, signed stub forms, team directory, welcome guide, manager notes, and onboarding checklists. The synthetic files use plausible employer-side language patterns; names and employer ('BrightWater Industries', 'Alex Morgan') are fictional.

entries.description: Real USCIS Form I-9 (Employment Eligibility Verification) blank PDF. Public domain US federal form. Source: https://www.uscis.gov/sites/default/files/document/forms/i-9.pdf
Real IRS Form W-4 (Employee's Withholding Certificate) blank PDF. Public domain US federal form. Source: https://www.irs.gov/pub/irs-pdf/fw4.pdf
Synthetic short HR policy: Code of Conduct
Synthetic short HR policy: PTO and Leave
Synthetic short HR policy: Remote Work and Hybrid
Synthetic welcome guide Word doc with longer narrative
Synthetic team directory with names and roles
Synthetic manager follow-up notes with onboarding dependencies and conflicts
Synthetic compact org chart in plain text
